response:
* The abstract discusses the relationship between astrocytic coverage and glutamate clearance in the hypothalamic supraoptic nucleus.  
* It highlights that glutamate clearance influences synaptic transmission and glutamate diffusion.  
* The study shows that reduced glutamate clearance affects transmitter release via metabotropic glutamate receptors.  
* Astrocytic coverage modulates synaptic efficacy by influencing glutamate dynamics.  
* The title mentions "control of glutamate clearance and synaptic efficacy by glial coverage of neurons."  
* *highlighted section* This title accurately reflects the main findings of the abstract.  
* The abstract connects glial coverage to both glutamate clearance and synaptic function.  
* The title effectively summarizes the core message of the research.  
* Therefore, the title is appropriate for the given abstract.
